name: CPG hybrid — fitness v7 (forward-gated bonuses + stagnation penalty)
changes_from_exp006: upright_bonus now motion-gated: only accumulates when x_vel > 0.2 m/s (standing still earns 0)
time_alive (W_TIME_ALIVE=0.05) replaced by progress_bonus (W_PROGRESS=0.05): only counts steps while moving
Added stagnation_penalty: per-step penalty = consecutive_stagnant_steps × 0.002 (quadratic cost for standing still)
W_ALTERNATION: 8.0 → 5.0 (one step not worth much; reward comes from sustained alternation)
MIN_MOVING_SPEED = 0.2 m/s threshold distinguishes moving vs stagnant

fitness_function.formula: cumulative_distance*30 + upright(gated)*0.2 + speed_bonus*1.0 + alternation_bonus*5.0 + progress_bonus*0.05 - pitch_rate*0.05 - sym_contact*3.0 - stagnation_penalty - joint_penalty*0.01 - impact_penalty*0.005 - fall_penalty*200

rationale.exp006_diagnosis: Creature took one step then stood still with legs wide apart. upright_bonus (~180 pts) and time_alive (~50 pts) paid unconditionally regardless of motion. One alternation switch earned 8 pts. Total for lazy balancing: ~238 pts, which was higher than attempting to walk and risk falling.
rationale.motion_gated_upright: upright_bonus now requires x_vel > 0.2 m/s. A statue earns 0. A walking creature earns full bonus.
rationale.stagnation_penalty: Quadratic cost: first stagnant step costs 0.002, second 0.004, ..., 999th costs 1.998. Standing still for 1000 steps costs 0.002×(1+2+...+999) = 999 pts — far worse than any fall.
rationale.warm_from_exp006: Warm-start from exp006 because exp006 found the 'one good step' — we want to build on that and push forward.

predicted_score_stander.note: One step then stand still for 999 steps
